Description:
A Reimagined Nacht der Untoten before it's ruined with expanded areas, World at War Weapons, Black Op 1 Weapons, Perks, and Pack-a-Punch. My vision was a traditional map and make it feel like the golden days of zombies. 

This map is my first ever map. Please give feedback as I am still bug testing.

-Perks-
Quick Revive
Double Tap 2.0
Speed Cola
Mule Kick
Stamina Up
PHD Flopper - Sprint jump off a ledge an explosion will happen when you land.
Electric Cherry
Juggernog

-Features-
95% of Waw and Bo1 weapons
Wonder Weapons: Flamethrower, Wunderwaffe, RayGun Mk1
Waw UI
Easter Egg
Pack-a-Punch
Rampage mode for only sprinters

-Easter Egg -





!!!!SPOILER!!!!



-Easter Egg 1-

Shoot the perk posters around the map to increase the perk limit from 4 -> 5.

The posters depict Speed Cola, Quick Revive, Double Tap, and Juggernog, the posters are close to their respective perk.

-Easter Egg 2-

There is now Juggernog on this map!!! But is limited and hidden around. there are 4 bottles that you can find and if you hold F can actually drink to gain the Juggernog perk. If you already reached the perk limit you can't drink the bottles.
